post.description: This API updates multiple contracts at once.

get.description: To get a list of contracts

post.description: This API creates a contract in your helpdesk.

get.description: This API fetches a single contract from your helpdesk.

patch.description: This API updates details of an existing contact.

get.summary: Get contract count by custom view and department
get.description: This API return the count of contract based on the custom view and department specified. If ownerId is specified, it will return the count of contracts owned by the owner in the specified department.

isCustomField.description: Key that denotes if the field is a user-defined field or not

fieldName.description: Name of the field to update

associatedSLAId.description: ID of the SLA associated with the contract

productId.description: ID of the product associated with the contract

endDate.description: Date until which the contract is valid

departmentId.description: ID of the department to which the contract belongs

notifyBefore.description: Number of days before endDate when notifications about contract expiry must be sent to the agents concerned

description.description: A short description of the contract

associatedSupportPlanId.description: ID of the Associated Support Plan

accountId.description: ID of the account associated with the contract

startDate.description: Date from which the contract is valid
